description: Comprehensive Elasticsearch monitoring dashboard covering cluster health, node metrics, JVM performance, index operations, search latency, caching, network, ingestion, thread pools, circuit breakers, and OS-level metrics. Uses OpenTelemetry Elasticsearch receiver metrics.
title: Elasticsearch Monitoring (OTEL)

widgets.description: Overall health of the Elasticsearch cluster. 1 = green, 2 = yellow, 3 = red.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Cluster Health Status

widgets.description: Total number of nodes in the cluster.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Cluster Nodes

widgets.description: Number of data nodes in the cluster.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Data Nodes

widgets.description: Number of shards in the cluster broken down by state (active, initializing, relocating, unassigned).

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Cluster Shards by State

widgets.description: Number of cluster-level changes that have not yet been executed.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Cluster Pending Tasks

widgets.description: Number of unfinished fetches in the cluster.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: In-Flight Fetches

widgets.description: CPU usage percentage for each Elasticsearch node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Node CPU Usage

widgets.description: One-minute CPU load average per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: CPU Load Average (1m)

widgets.description: Total disk space for each Elasticsearch node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Node Disk Total

widgets.description: Available disk space for JVM on each Elasticsearch node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Node Disk Available

widgets.description: Unallocated disk space on each Elasticsearch node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Node Disk Free

widgets.description: Number of open file descriptors held by each node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Open File Descriptors

widgets.description: Current heap memory usage per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: JVM Heap Memory Used

widgets.description: Maximum heap memory available per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: JVM Heap Memory Max

widgets.description: Fraction of heap memory in use (0-1) per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: JVM Heap Utilization

widgets.description: Current non-heap memory usage per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: JVM Non-Heap Memory Used

widgets.description: Rate of garbage collection invocations per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: GC Collections Count

widgets.description: Rate of time spent in garbage collection per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: GC Collection Time

widgets.description: Current JVM thread count per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: JVM Threads

widgets.description: Number of loaded classes in the JVM per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: JVM Classes Loaded

widgets.description: Total document count across indices, broken down by state (active, deleted).

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Index Document Count

widgets.description: Rate of completed index operations (indexing, deleting, merging, etc.).

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Indexing Rate

widgets.description: Rate of time spent on index operations by type.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Index Operation Time

widgets.description: Total disk size of index shards.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Index Shards Size

widgets.description: Number of segments across all indices.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Index Segments Count

widgets.description: Number of currently active segment merge operations.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Active Segment Merges

widgets.description: Rate of completed search (query + fetch) operations across nodes.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name AND operation = 'query'
deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name AND operation = 'fetch'

widgets.title: Search Request Rate

widgets.description: Rate of time spent on search operations (query + fetch) per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name AND operation = 'query'
deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name AND operation = 'fetch'

widgets.title: Search Operation Time

widgets.description: Rate of completed indexing operations per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name AND operation = 'index'

widgets.title: Node Indexing Rate

widgets.description: Rate of completed GET operations broken down by hit/miss result.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: GET Operations (Hits vs Misses)

widgets.description: Rate of cache evictions per node by cache type.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Node Cache Evictions

widgets.description: Cache memory usage in bytes per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Node Cache Memory Usage

widgets.description: Rate of query cache hits and misses per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Query Cache Hits / Misses

widgets.description: Rate of cache evictions at the index level.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name

widgets.title: Index Cache Evictions

widgets.description: Number of HTTP connections to each node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: HTTP Connections

widgets.description: Number of open TCP connections for internal cluster communication per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Cluster TCP Connections

widgets.description: Bytes sent and received on the internal cluster network per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Cluster Network I/O

widgets.description: Rate of documents ingested over the lifetime of each node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Documents Ingested

widgets.description: Number of documents currently being ingested per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Documents Currently Ingesting

widgets.description: Rate of total failed ingest operations per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Ingest Operations Failed

widgets.description: Number of queued tasks in thread pools per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Thread Pool Tasks Queued

widgets.description: Rate of finished tasks in thread pools per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Thread Pool Tasks Finished

widgets.description: Number of threads in thread pools per node by state.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Thread Pool Threads

widgets.description: Estimated memory used for circuit breaker operations by breaker name.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Breaker Estimated Memory

widgets.description: Configured memory limit for each circuit breaker.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Breaker Memory Limit

widgets.description: Rate of circuit breaker trips (OOM prevention events) per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Breaker Tripped

widgets.description: Physical memory broken down by state (free, used) per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: OS Memory (Free vs Used)

widgets.description: JVM process CPU usage percentage per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Process CPU Usage

widgets.description: Virtual memory guaranteed to the JVM process per node.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Process Virtual Memory

widgets.description: Document count per node broken down by state.

filter.expression: deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND elasticsearch.cluster.name = $elasticsearch.cluster.name AND elasticsearch.node.name IN $elasticsearch.node.name

widgets.title: Node Document Count
